payload.answer: This looks like a new contextual preference about your morning routine. Choose how you’d like Brain to handle it.
repair_options: Add this as a separate preference: you usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email.
Keep this only as conversational context and do not store it as durable memory.
If an existing morning-routine or reading-preference memory exists, review it before deciding whether to keep both or update the existing one.
